items.title: New UFO files offer vivid descriptions of discs, orbs and a 'potato'
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Spider-Man of Yemen' dies falling into volcanic crater
items.dek: Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar had been attempting to climb its walls without safety equipment when he fell in, local authorities say.
items.body: Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar had been attempting to climb its walls without safety equipment when he fell in, local authorities say.

items.title: South Korea's Starbucks to shut for staff history lesson after backlash
items.dek: The chain was criticised for a "Tank Day" marketing ploy on the anniversary of a military massacre.
items.body: The chain was criticised for a "Tank Day" marketing ploy on the anniversary of a military massacre.
